title: Masters in Business Administration
program_description: MBA for practicing managers that emphasizes strategic analysis, interdisciplinary skills, and management practice.
duration: 4 regular semesters (2 academic years) minimum; 8 regular semesters (4 years) maximum
admission_requirements: Bachelor's degree from an accredited institution or an equivalent degree as evaluated by the Ministry of Higher Education; relevant professional experience; minimum GPA of 2.5 in the undergraduate degree; English placement test unless exempt; Graduate Entrance Exam unless exempt; non-business applicants must complete 16 credit hours of remedial courses.
gmat_requirement: Applicants with evidence of a minimum GMAT score of 500 or equivalent are exempted from the Graduate Entrance Exam.

tuition.notes: Official MBA program detail page lists tuition at USD 170 per credit hour.

notes: Official MBA general program published on the Faculty of Business Studies postgraduate and program detail pages.

title: Masters in Business Administration (Finance)
program_description: MBA specialization in finance that develops skills to analyze and solve complex business finance problems and communicate finance findings effectively.
duration: 4 regular semesters (2 academic years) minimum; 8 regular semesters (4 years) maximum
admission_requirements: Bachelor's degree from an accredited institution or an equivalent degree as evaluated by the Ministry of Higher Education; relevant professional experience; minimum GPA of 2.5 in the undergraduate degree; English placement test unless exempt; Graduate Entrance Exam unless exempt; non-business applicants must complete 16 credit hours of remedial courses.
gmat_requirement: Applicants with evidence of a minimum GMAT score of 500 or equivalent are exempted from the Graduate Entrance Exam.

tuition.notes: Official MBA Finance program detail page lists tuition at USD 170 per credit hour.

notes: Official MBA Finance program published on the Faculty of Business Studies postgraduate and program detail pages.

title: Masters in Business Administration (HRM)
program_description: MBA specialization in human resource management that develops management and HRM decision-making skills for professional practice.
duration: 4 regular semesters (2 academic years) minimum; 8 regular semesters (4 years) maximum
admission_requirements: Bachelor's degree from an accredited institution or an equivalent degree as evaluated by the Ministry of Higher Education; relevant professional experience; minimum GPA of 2.5 in the undergraduate degree; English placement test unless exempt; Graduate Entrance Exam unless exempt; non-business applicants must complete 16 credit hours of remedial courses.
gmat_requirement: Applicants with evidence of a minimum GMAT score of 500 or equivalent are exempted from the Graduate Entrance Exam.

tuition.notes: Official MBA HRM program detail page lists tuition at USD 170 per credit hour.

notes: Official MBA HRM program published on the Faculty of Business Studies postgraduate and program detail pages.

title: MSc in Computing (Cyber Security and Forensics)
program_description: MSc in Computing focused on Cyber Security and Forensics, combining compulsory modules, electives, and a research project with dissertation.
duration: 4 regular semesters (2 academic years) minimum; 8 regular semesters (4 years) maximum
admission_requirements: BSc in Information Technology-related subjects from AOU or another recognized university; minimum GPA of 2.5; applicants from mathematics, physics, business computing, or other relevant backgrounds may need 12 additional ITC credits before starting the MSc; English placement test unless exempt.

tuition.notes: Official MSc Computing program detail page lists tuition at USD 170 per credit hour.

notes: Official MSc Computing program published on the Faculty of Computer Studies postgraduate and program detail pages.

title: MA in Teaching English as a Foreign Language (TEFL) - Thesis Track
program_description: MA in Teaching English as a Foreign Language with a thesis track, compulsory modules, and a thesis module.
duration: 4 regular semesters (2 academic years) minimum; 8 regular semesters (4 years) maximum
admission_requirements: BA degree in English Language and Literature or a related specialization from AOU or another recognized university with a graduation rating of GOOD or higher as evaluated by the Ministry of Higher Education; IELTS Academic band 6 or higher, or TOEFL paper-based 550 or equivalent computer-based score.

tuition.notes: Official MA TEFL program detail page lists tuition at USD 170 per credit hour.

notes: Official MA TEFL thesis-track program published on the Faculty of Language Studies postgraduate and program detail pages. The detail page also refers to dissertation and comprehensive-exam tracks, but the central graduate listing exposes the thesis-track title.
